name: Zesty Steak Chili
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds round steak, cut into 1-inch cubes
3 cans (14.5 oz each) diced tomatoes, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven over medium-high heat, sauté steak and garlic in oil until browned.
2. Add onion; cook and stir for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in 2 cups water, celery, tomato products, salsa, and seasonings; bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat; cover and simmer 2 hours or until tender.
5. Combine flour, cornmeal, and remaining water; stir until smooth.
6. Bring chili to a boil. Add flour mixture; cook and stir for 2 minutes or until thickened.
7. Garnish with cheese, sour cream, onions, and olives (optional).
